'''鈭歠-n-ng-z''' ('''kafanngezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chast|chast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-ng-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chast|chast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-n-ng-z
|-
! Lemma
| kafanngezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifangezoko|thifangezoko]] || [[word:jifangezoko|jifangezoko]] || [[word:shifangezoko|shifangezoko]] || [[word:kifangezoko|kifangezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufangezoko|thuthufangezoko]] || [[word:jujufangezoko|jujufangezoko]] || [[word:shushufangezoko|shushufangezoko]] || [[word:kukufangezoko|kukufangezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofangezoko|thothofangezoko]] || [[word:jojofangezoko|jojofangezoko]] || [[word:shoshofangezoko|shoshofangezoko]] || [[word:kokofangezoko|kokofangezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofangezoko|thofangezoko]] || [[word:jofangezoko|jofangezoko]] || [[word:shofangezoko|shofangezoko]] || [[word:kofangezoko|kofangezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofangezoko|thofangezoko]] || [[word:jofangezoko|jofangezoko]] || [[word:shofangezoko|shofangezoko]] || [[word:kofangezoko|kofangezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fangezoko|th忙fangezoko]] || [[word:j忙fangezoko|j忙fangezoko]] || [[word:sh忙fangezoko|sh忙fangezoko]] || [[word:k忙fangezoko|k忙fangezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafangezoko|thathafangezoko]] || [[word:jajafangezoko|jajafangezoko]] || [[word:shashafangezoko|shashafangezoko]] || [[word:kakafangezoko|kakafangezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafangezoko|thafangezoko]] || [[word:jafangezoko|jafangezoko]] || [[word:shafangezoko|shafangezoko]] || [[word:kafangezoko|kafangezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafangezoko|thafangezoko]] || [[word:jafangezoko|jafangezoko]] || [[word:shafangezoko|shafangezoko]] || [[word:kafangezoko|kafangezoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
